description: An accountant needs to reconcile the Goods Receipt / Invoice Receipt (GR/IR) clearing account, which should theoretically have a zero balance.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all transactions in the GR/IR clearing account for the month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of all debits (goods receipts) and credits (invoice receipts).

nodes.task_description: Identify any items that have a goods receipt but no matching invoice receipt (and vice versa) that are causing the account to have a non-zero balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds several old items for which goods were received but an invoice was never processed.

nodes.task_description: Create a task for the AP department to investigate the old items and either chase the vendor for an invoice or reverse the goods receipt if it was made in error.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates actionable tasks to clear the reconciling items.
